queries.question: What is the dividend yield of PQR Ltd.
queries.sql: SELECT Dividend_Percentage FROM Dividends JOIN Shares ON Dividends.ShareID = Shares.ShareID WHERE Stock = 'PQR Ltd.'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?dividend_percentage WHERE {
  ?dividends a :Dividends .
  ?shares a :Shares .
  ?dividends p:hasShares ?shares .
  ?dividends p:Dividend_Percentage ?dividend_percentage .
  ?shares p:Stock ?stock_f .
  FILTER(STR(?stock_f) = "PQR Ltd.")
}

queries.question: What is the dividend yield of PQR Ltd.
queries.sql: SELECT Dividend_Percentage, Dividend_Value FROM Dividends JOIN Shares ON Dividends.ShareID = Shares.ShareID WHERE Stock = 'PQR Ltd.'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?dividend_percentage ?dividend_value WHERE {
  ?dividends a :Dividends .
  ?shares a :Shares .
  ?dividends p:hasShares ?shares .
  ?dividends p:Dividend_Percentage ?dividend_percentage .
  ?dividends p:Dividend_Value ?dividend_value .
  ?shares p:Stock ?stock_f .
  FILTER(STR(?stock_f) = "PQR Ltd.")
}

queries.question: List the dividend values in order of payment dates
queries.sql: SELECT Dividend_Value FROM Dividends ORDER BY ExpectedPaymentDate
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?dividend_value WHERE {
  ?dividends a :Dividends .
  ?dividends p:Dividend_Value ?dividend_value .
  ?dividends p:ExpectedPaymentDate ?expectedpaymentdate_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?expectedpaymentdate_o)

queries.question: List the dividend percentages and values in order of payment dates
queries.sql: SELECT Dividend_Percentage, Dividend_Value FROM Dividends ORDER BY ExpectedPaymentDate
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?dividend_percentage ?dividend_value WHERE {
  ?dividends a :Dividends .
  ?dividends p:Dividend_Percentage ?dividend_percentage .
  ?dividends p:Dividend_Value ?dividend_value .
  ?dividends p:ExpectedPaymentDate ?expectedpaymentdate_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?expectedpaymentdate_o)
